hero.title: Build with
hero.description: Everything you need to integrate with TaskFlow. Explore our REST API, authentication guides, and workflow documentation to get started in minutes.

quickstart.title: Up and running in
quickstart.description: Follow these steps to start managing projects and tasks with the TaskFlow API.

0.title: Create an Account
0.description: Sign up with your email and password. You'll receive a welcome email to confirm your account.

1.title: Authenticate
1.description: Log in to receive your JWT token. Include it in the Authorization header for all subsequent requests.

2.title: Create a Project
2.description: Start organizing your work by creating a project. You'll automatically become the project owner.

3.title: Add Tasks
3.description: Create tasks within your project. Assign them to team members and set priorities and deadlines.

reference.title: Complete
reference.description: Explore all available endpoints organized by resource. All endpoints use the base URL /api.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.description: Register, login, and manage user sessions with JWT tokens.

endpoints.0: Create a new user account and receive a JWT token
endpoints.1: Authenticate and receive a JWT token

users.title: Users
users.description: Manage user profiles, avatars, and account settings.

endpoints.2: Get a specific user by ID

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Create and manage projects, invite members with role-based access.

endpoints.1: List projects you're a member of
endpoints.2: Get full project details with members and tasks
endpoints.3: Update project title, description, or status
endpoints.4: Delete a project and all associated data
endpoints.5: Add a member to the project

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Create, assign, and track tasks with status workflows and priority levels.

endpoints.0: Create a new task in a project
endpoints.1: Get all tasks assigned to you
endpoints.3: List all tasks for a project
endpoints.6: Approve or reject a task in review (Owner only)

auth.title: Secure
auth.description: TaskFlow uses JWT (JSON Web Tokens) for authentication. Include your token in every request to access protected resources.

0.title: Register or Login
0.desc: Call the auth endpoint with your credentials

1.title: Receive JWT Token
1.desc: Server returns a signed JWT in the response

2.title: Include in Requests
2.desc: Add the token to the Authorization header

3.title: Access Resources
3.desc: Server validates the token and returns data

owner.desc: Full control — manage members, verify tasks

admin.desc: Create projects, manage tasks and members

workflow.title: Task
workflow.description: Tasks follow a structured workflow from creation to completion, with a verification step to ensure quality.

0.title: Task Creation
0.desc: Owner or Admin creates a task and optionally assigns it to a project member. Status starts as TODO.

1.title: Status Transitions
1.desc: The assignee or any manager can move tasks through TODO → IN_PROGRESS → IN_REVIEW using the status endpoint.

2.title: Verification
2.desc: Only the project Owner can approve (→ DONE) or reject (→ IN_PROGRESS) tasks that are IN_REVIEW.

3.title: Completion
3.desc: DONE status is only reachable through the verify endpoint — it cannot be set directly.

cta.title: Ready to start building?
cta.description: Create your free account and start integrating with the TaskFlow API in minutes. Full Swagger documentation available at /api/docs.
